<?php /** * ReasonFlags * * PHP version 5 * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> * @copyright 2016 Jim Wigginton * @license http://www.opensource.org/licenses/mit-license.html MIT License * @link http://phpseclib.sourceforge.net */ namespace phpseclib3\File\ASN1\Maps; use phpseclib3\File\ASN1; /** * ReasonFlags * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> */ abstract class ReasonFlags { const MAP = [ 'type' => ASN1::TYPE_BIT_STRING, 'mapping' => [ 'unused', 'keyCompromise', 'cACompromise', 'affiliationChanged', 'superseded', 'cessationOfOperation', 'certificateHold', 'privilegeWithdrawn', 'aACompromise' ] ]; }
